_description: Site knowledge base for HaxJobs auto-apply. Each platform has known selectors, field patterns, and quirks. Updated as we reverse-engineer more platforms.

api.notes: REST API for job listings. Apply endpoint accepts multipart form POST.

quirks.file_upload: Supports PDF, DOC, DOCX. Max 5MB typically.
quirks.submit_behavior: Single-page form, no CAPTCHA on standard applications.
quirks.auto_fill_risk: LOW — Lever is the most automation-friendly ATS.
quirks.known_issues: Some companies add custom questions (work authorization, visa). Must pause before these.

api.notes: No public JSON API for jobs. Form submit is standard multipart POST.

quirks.file_upload: PDF, DOC, DOCX, TXT. Resume required field.
quirks.submit_behavior: Multi-page form — Greenhouse splits into sections (Personal Info, Resume, Questions, Demographics). Demographics always optional.
quirks.auto_fill_risk: LOW-MEDIUM — multi-page means more steps, but all selectors are consistent.
quirks.known_issues: Demographics page at the end — always skip. Some companies use Greenhouse's 'custom questions' feature heavily.

api.apply_endpoint: POST to form action URL (dynamic per job)
api.notes: JSON API for job listings. Form is standard HTML POST, no CAPTCHA.

quirks.submit_behavior: Single-page or two-page form. Clean, consistent HTML.
quirks.auto_fill_risk: LOW — Ashby is simple and consistent.
quirks.known_issues: Rarely has custom questions. Usually just resume + basics.

api.jobs: HTML parse only (heavy SPA, SSR content)
api.apply_endpoint: POST to dynamic endpoint (per company subdomain)
api.notes: Heavy JavaScript SPA. Each company has unique subdomain and form structure. Hardest ATS to automate.

quirks.submit_behavior: Multi-step wizard. Can be 5-10 pages. Each company customizes heavily.
quirks.auto_fill_risk: HIGH — each Workday instance is customized. Selectors change per company. Not recommended for auto-apply.
quirks.known_issues: CAPTCHA sometimes. Requires manual session for login. Cookie consent wall.
quirks.rate_limiting: None observed, but heavy JS makes automation fragile.
quirks.recommendation: Manual apply only. Use Playwright to pre-fill fields, but always require human approval before submit.

api.notes: Modern ATS, clean HTML. Less common than Lever/Greenhouse but growing.

quirks.auto_fill_risk: LOW-MEDIUM — relatively simple, but less tested than Lever/Greenhouse.

api.notes: Clean, modern ATS. Single-page forms. No CAPTCHA.

quirks.submit_behavior: Clean single-page form. One of the easier ATS platforms.
